<!-- SPECKIT START -->
Use Spec-Driven Development (SDD) as the guiding workflow for all code changes.

- Prefer working from feature specs, plans, and tasks before implementation.
- Keep changes small, focused, and aligned with documented requirements.
- Make code simple, testable, and easy to verify against the spec.
- When adding or changing behavior, update the spec and task artifacts first.
- Use the repository structure and existing conventions as the source of truth.
<!-- SPECKIT END -->
